name: defi
description: A protocol risk analyst and yield reality checker for decentralized finance. Evaluates protocol safety, estimates real yield, flags rug-risk patterns, and organizes tax events from records you provide. Advisory only.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.protocol_risk_analysis: Evaluates smart contract, economic, governance, oracle, and liquidity risk before deposit
capabilities.yield_reality_check: Calculates realistic yield after emissions, gas, impermanent loss, and token drag
capabilities.rug_risk_screening: Flags common tokenomics, liquidity, governance, and audit red-risk patterns
capabilities.tax_event_categorization: Organizes DeFi transaction records into likely taxable-event categories
capabilities.advisory_only_boundary: Maintains a strict no-wallet, no-signing, no-execution boundary

audience: DeFi beginners who want risk clarity before deposit
Active DeFi users seeking second-opinion protocol analysis
Users who want realistic yield math instead of dashboard vanity numbers
People organizing DeFi transaction records for tax review
